# Differential expression

::: {.lang-en}
Per-contrast DESeq2 results (Wald test, apeglm-shrunken LFC). DEG cutoffs from `config.yaml` (primary / secondary). `log2FoldChange` is apeglm-shrunken and `padj` is B-H adjusted p-value.
:::

::: {.lang-ko}
Contrast별 DESeq2 결과. DEG cutoff는 `config.yaml`의 primary / secondary 설정 사용. LFC는 apeglm 적용, padj는 B-H method 사용하였음.
:::

````{r de-child-template, include=FALSE}
# Child template rendered once per contrast. Outer chunk uses a 4-backtick
# fence so the 3-backtick chunk fences inside the string are not parsed by
# pandoc. Each contrast has its own env so variables do not bleed.
de_child_template <- r"---(
## `r cid`

`r contrast_desc`

### DEG summary

```{r de-deg-summary, results='asis'}
if (is.null(deg_sum) || nrow(deg_sum) == 0) {
  cat(as.character(no_results("DEG summary table not produced.")))
} else {
  print(knitr::kable(deg_sum, caption = sprintf("DEG counts for %s", cid)))
}
```

### Volcano plot

```{r de-volcano, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=6}
if (is.null(de_tbl) || nrow(de_tbl) == 0) {
  no_results("DE result table is empty.")
} else {
  v_df <- de_tbl |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      neglog10p = -log10(pmax(pvalue, 1e-300)),
      sig = dplyr::case_when(
        is.na(padj)                                         ~ "ns",
        padj < prim_padj & abs(log2FoldChange) >= prim_lfc  ~ "primary",
        padj < sec_padj  & abs(log2FoldChange) >= sec_lfc   ~ "secondary",
        TRUE                                                ~ "ns"
      )
    )
  pal <- c(primary = "#c0392b", secondary = "#e67e22")

  # Non-significant points: static gray background, no hover, capped at 3k by
  # random subsample (purely visual). Significant points (primary+secondary)
  # keep full interactive hover with gene labels.
  sig_df <- v_df |> dplyr::filter(sig != "ns")
  ns_df  <- v_df |> dplyr::filter(sig == "ns")
  ns_cap <- 3000L
  if (nrow(ns_df) > ns_cap) {
    set.seed(42)
    ns_df <- ns_df[sample.int(nrow(ns_df), ns_cap), , drop = FALSE]
  }

  p <- ggplot2::ggplot() +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = ns_df,
      ggplot2::aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = neglog10p),
      colour = "grey70", alpha = 0.45, size = 1.1
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = sig_df,
      ggplot2::aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = neglog10p, colour = sig,
                   text = sprintf("%s | LFC=%.2f | padj=%.2g",
                                  gene_name, log2FoldChange, padj)),
      alpha = 0.85, size = 1.6
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_colour_manual(values = pal) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = c(-prim_lfc, prim_lfc), linetype = "dashed",
                        colour = "grey40") +
    ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(prim_padj), linetype = "dashed",
                        colour = "grey40") +
    ggplot2::labs(x = "log2FoldChange (apeglm)", y = "-log10(pvalue)",
                  colour = "tier") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12)

  if (is_html_report()) {
    fig <- plotly::ggplotly(p, tooltip = "text", height = 550)
    # Kill hover on the ns (static) trace — it is the first geom, trace index 0.
    fig <- plotly::style(fig, hoverinfo = "skip", traces = 0)
    plotly::layout(fig, margin = list(t = 30, b = 40, l = 50, r = 20))
  } else {
    p
  }
}
```

### MA plot

```{r de-ma, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=5.5}
if (is.null(de_tbl) || nrow(de_tbl) == 0) {
  no_results("DE result table is empty.")
} else {
  ma_df <- de_tbl |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      sig = !is.na(padj) & padj < prim_padj & abs(log2FoldChange) >= prim_lfc
    )
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(ma_df,
           ggplot2::aes(x = log10(pmax(baseMean, 1)), y = log2FoldChange,
                        colour = sig)) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.2) +
    ggplot2::scale_colour_manual(values = c(`TRUE` = "#c0392b", `FALSE` = "grey60")) +
    ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0, colour = "grey40") +
    ggplot2::labs(x = "log10(baseMean)", y = "log2FoldChange (apeglm)",
                  colour = sprintf("padj<%.2g & |LFC|>=%.2g", prim_padj, prim_lfc)) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
  p
}
```

### Top DEG heatmap (VST, row z-score)

```{r de-top-heatmap, fig.width=8.5, fig.height=9}
if (is.null(de_tbl) || nrow(de_tbl) == 0 || is.null(vst_mat)) {
  no_results("VST matrix or DE results unavailable for heatmap.")
} else {
  cand <- de_tbl |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(padj), !is.na(log2FoldChange)) |>
    dplyr::arrange(padj)
  top <- head(cand, 30)
  if (nrow(top) == 0) {
    no_results("No genes with finite padj/LFC for heatmap.")
  } else {
    rows <- intersect(top$gene_id, rownames(vst_mat))
    if (length(rows) < 2) {
      no_results("Fewer than 2 top genes found in VST matrix.")
    } else {
      M <- vst_mat[rows, , drop = FALSE]
      label_map <- setNames(top$gene_name, top$gene_id)
      rn <- ifelse(is.na(label_map[rows]) | !nzchar(label_map[rows]),
                   rows, label_map[rows])
      rn <- make.unique(rn)
      rownames(M) <- rn
      Z <- t(scale(t(M)))
      
      # Perform hierarchical clustering for rows and columns
      row_hc <- hclust(dist(Z), method = "average")
      col_hc <- hclust(dist(t(Z)), method = "average")
      
      long <- as.data.frame(as.table(Z))
      names(long) <- c("gene", "sample", "z")
      long$gene <- factor(long$gene, levels = rownames(Z)[row_hc$order])
      long$sample <- factor(long$sample, levels = colnames(Z)[col_hc$order])

      p <- ggplot2::ggplot(long, ggplot2::aes(x = sample, y = gene, fill = z)) +
        ggplot2::geom_tile() +
        ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#2c7bb6", mid = "white",
                                      high = "#d7191c", midpoint = 0) +
        ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = "z-score") +
        ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
        ggplot2::theme(
          axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9),
          plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(6, 10, 12, 6)
        )
      p
    }
  }
}
```

### Full DE result table

```{r de-results-table}
if (is.null(de_tbl) || nrow(de_tbl) == 0) {
  no_results("DE result table is empty.")
} else {
  show_cols <- c("gene_id", "gene_name", "baseMean",
                 "log2FoldChange", "lfcSE", "stat", "pvalue", "padj")
  show_cols <- intersect(show_cols, names(de_tbl))
  de_show <- head(dplyr::arrange(de_tbl, padj), 500)[, show_cols, drop = FALSE]
  report_table(
    de_show,
    rownames = FALSE,
    filter = "top",
    extensions = "Buttons",
    options  = list(pageLength = 10, lengthMenu = c(10, 25, 50, 100), scrollX = TRUE, dom = "Blfrtip",
                    buttons = c("csv", "copy")),
    signif_cols = intersect(c("baseMean", "log2FoldChange", "lfcSE",
                          "stat", "pvalue", "padj"), show_cols),
    digits  = 3
  )
}
```

)---"
````

```{r de-render, results='asis'}
prim <- cfg$de$primary   %||% list(padj = 0.05, abs_lfc = 1)
sec  <- cfg$de$secondary %||% list(padj = 0.10, abs_lfc = 0.5)

dds_path <- rp("results", "exploratory", "dds_vst.rds")
vst_mat  <- NULL
if (file.exists(dds_path)) {
  dds_obj <- tryCatch(readRDS(dds_path), error = function(e) NULL)
  if (!is.null(dds_obj)) {
    vst_mat <- tryCatch(
      SummarizedExperiment::assay(dds_obj),
      error = function(e) tryCatch(as.matrix(dds_obj@assays@data[[1]]),
                                   error = function(e2) NULL)
    )
  }
}

if (nrow(contrasts) == 0) {
  cat("\n")
  print(no_results("No contrasts defined in contrasts.tsv."))
}

for (cid in contrasts$contrast_id) {
  crow <- contrast_row(cid)
  contrast_desc <- sprintf(
    "Numerator: **%s** · Denominator: **%s** · Factor: **%s**%s",
    crow$numerator, crow$denominator, crow$factor,
    if (!is.null(crow$description) && nzchar(as.character(crow$description)))
      paste0(" · _", crow$description, "_") else ""
  )

  de_tbl  <- safe_read(rp("results", "de", cid, "deseq2_results.csv"))
  deg_sum <- safe_read(rp("results", "de", cid, "deg_summary.tsv"), sep = "\t")

  env <- new.env(parent = globalenv())
  env$cid           <- cid
  env$contrast_desc <- contrast_desc
  env$de_tbl        <- de_tbl
  env$deg_sum       <- deg_sum
  env$vst_mat       <- vst_mat
  env$prim_padj     <- prim$padj
  env$prim_lfc      <- prim$abs_lfc
  env$sec_padj      <- sec$padj
  env$sec_lfc       <- sec$abs_lfc
  env$no_results    <- no_results
  env$cfg           <- cfg
  env$`%||%`        <- `%||%`

  out <- knitr::knit_child(
    text  = de_child_template,
    envir = env,
    quiet = TRUE
  )
  cat(out, sep = "\n")
}
```
